summary: Bug fix verified for Battle game NaN damage display. Found and fixed critical JavaScript temporal dead zone error where useEffect referenced battleConfig before its useMemo definition.

battle_nan_fix.1_battleConfig_definition_order: FIXED - battleConfig useMemo was defined AFTER useEffect that used it, causing 'Cannot access battleConfig before initialization' error
battle_nan_fix.2_damage_display: PASS - Damage shows '-30 HP' correctly, NOT '-NaN HP'
battle_nan_fix.3_timer_config: PASS - Timer shows 30s default and resets correctly per round
battle_nan_fix.4_score_calculation: PASS - Score updated to 300 after correct answer (30 damage × 10)
battle_nan_fix.5_enemy_hp: PASS - Brutal Orc HP decreased from 100 to 70 (30 damage applied correctly)
battle_nan_fix.6_speed_bonus: PASS - Speed bonus applied (25 base + 5 speed bonus = 30 total damage)

code_fix_applied.issue: JavaScript temporal dead zone - useEffect at line 631 referenced battleConfig before its useMemo definition at line 642
code_fix_applied.fix: Moved battleConfig useMemo declaration (line 636-647) BEFORE the useEffect that uses battleConfig.timer_per_round (line 649-654)

features_verified: Battle game damage calculation shows actual numbers (25, 30, etc.) instead of NaN - WORKING
Battle game correctly reads battle_config from spec - WORKING
Timer resets correctly per round based on battleConfig.timer_per_round (30s default) - WORKING
Enemy HP decreases correctly based on damage - WORKING
critical_code_review_comments: Original bug: useEffect referenced battleConfig before its useMemo definition causing temporal dead zone error
Fix applied: Reordered code to define battleConfig useMemo before any useEffect that uses it

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All battle game damage/timer features verified working

seed_data_creation: Used existing battle game 'Multiplication Monster Showdown' (id: b0553e09-9481-45f6-beaf-3a27b13792d7)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Battle game NaN bug fixed by reordering battleConfig useMemo before useEffect. Damage calculation now shows proper values (25 base + bonuses). Test battle game via studio preview to verify damage displays correctly.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: JavaScript temporal dead zone error - const declared with useMemo cannot be accessed before its declaration line
reproduction_steps: 1. Open any battle game in studio editor
4. Game fails to load, showing error screen
rca_of_issue.fix: Moved battleConfig useMemo declaration (lines 636-647) BEFORE the useEffect that references battleConfig.timer_per_round (lines 649-654)
rca_of_issue.verification: Game now loads correctly, damage shows -30 HP instead of -NaN HP
